external_services.service_name: Application for Health Certificates for Food Handlers
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Health Certificates for Food Handlers

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certificate of Attendance to Basic Food Safety Training (for new/lost replacements)
Chest X-Ray (1 yr validity), Stool Exam (3 mos validity), and Urinalysis (3 mos validity) results
Latest 1x1 ID picture (1 piece)

steps.client_step: 1. Attend Basic Food Safety Training (New Applicants) or Submit requirements to Environmental Sanitation Division (Renewal)
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Facilitate training, receive/check requirements, and advise client to pay at Cashier

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required fees at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt and fill out Information Sheet
steps.agency_action: 3. Process request; provide Information Sheet (Medical Officer review if lab findings exist)

steps.client_step: 4. Submit Information Sheet and claim Health Certificate
steps.agency_action: 4.1-5.0: Encode and release the Health Certificate

external_services.service_name: Application for Permit to Transfer Cadaver / Burial Permit / Cremation Permit / Exhumation Permit
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Permit to Transfer Cadaver / Burial Permit / Cremation Permit / Exhumation Permit
external_services.who_may_avail: Nearest kin of the deceased person

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Death Certificate from hospital
Death Certificate of remains to be exhumed
Exhumation Permit (valid only after 5-year burial lapse)

steps.client_step: 1. Present Death Certificate at the CHO transaction window
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Interview client, prepare permit/payment slip, review and sign permit

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Transfer(City): P100; Transfer(Outside): P50; Burial: P50; Cremation: P200; Exhumation: P100/tomb

steps.client_step: 3. Present official receipt and claim the permit
steps.agency_action: 3. Issue requested permit and return Death Certificate

external_services.office: Lipa City Health Office – Sanitation Division
external_services.who_may_avail: Business Establishments Operators (bars, restaurants, food chains, etc.)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Water Analysis (for water refilling stations)
Health Certificate (Stool, urine, x-ray) and 1x1 pictures (for food handlers)

steps.client_step: 1. Present requirements and inspection report at the Sanitary Division window
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive business permit application and supporting documents

steps.client_step: 2. Wait for preparation and approval
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2: Prepare, approve, and sign Sanitary Permit and Business Permit endorsement
steps.person_responsible: Sanitary Inspector VII, City Health Officer

steps.client_step: 3. Claim the approved documents
steps.agency_action: 3. Issue Sanitary Permit and employee Health Certificates

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Personal appearance

steps.client_step: 1. Get queue number and fill out patient record
steps.agency_action: 1. Sterilize dental instruments

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to vital signs corner and dental room
steps.agency_action: 2-3: Record vital signs; conduct chairside education and oral examination

steps.client_step: 3. Undergo treatment and receive prescription/referral
steps.agency_action: 4-6: Perform tooth extraction (if needed), prescribe meds, or refer complicated cases

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to pharmacy section
steps.agency_action: 7. Dispense medicines to patient

external_services.office: Lipa City Health Office – Sanitation Division

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Request letter addressed to the City Health (1 original copy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request letter to the Lipa City Health Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive letter, conduct inspection/set schedule, and perform fogging/misting services

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Referral (1 original copy)
Laboratory Results (U/A, CBC, HBSAg & UTZ), if available

steps.client_step: 1. Secure queue number and proceed to vital signs corner
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Check requirements, prepare record, and record vital signs

steps.client_step: 2. Medical Consultation
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.5: Examine patient, refer to lab/specialist, prescribe meds, or give hospital referral

steps.client_step: 3. Proceed to Laboratory and Pharmacy
steps.agency_action: 3-4: Perform tests (CBC, UA, Dengue) and dispense available medicines

external_services.service_name: Availing of Medical Treatment/ Consultation at the Animal Bite Treatment Center
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Availing of Medical Treatment/ Consultation at the Animal Bite Treatment Center
external_services.who_may_avail: Victims of animal bites/scratches or rabid animal exposure

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Biting Animal Form (1 original copy)

steps.client_step: 1. Get queue number and record vital signs
steps.agency_action: 1-2: Interview patient, prepare record, and take vital signs

steps.client_step: 2. Consultation and Treatment
steps.agency_action: 3-5: Conduct consultation, refer complicated cases, and administer ARV, ERIG, or Tetanus Toxoid

steps.client_step: 3. Claim medicines at Pharmacy
steps.agency_action: 6. Dispense medicines

external_services.office: Lipa City Health Office – East District Health Center

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Referral and Laboratory Results (if available)

steps.client_step: 1. Secure number and provide vital info
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Record vital signs, medical history, and treatment record

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to PHC area
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.5: Provide Primary Care, Pre-natal check-up, vaccination, or FP services; refer if complicated

external_services.office: Lipa City Health Office – TB DOTS Clinic
external_services.who_may_avail: Any patient suspected to have tuberculosis

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Chest X-Ray result and GenExpert Test result (1 original each)
checklist_of_requirements.source: DOH-accredited laboratory / Lipa CHO TB DOTS Clinic

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Referral, if available

steps.client_step: 1. Secure number and submit requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Prepare record, take vital signs, and provide TB education

steps.client_step: 2. Conduct medical consultation
steps.agency_action: 1.4. Review case and provide treatment plan

external_services.service_name: Availing of Teen Health Kiosk Services

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Referral and Laboratory Results (if available)

steps.client_step: 1. Get queue number and proceed to Counseling Room
steps.agency_action: 1.1-2.2: Record vital signs/info; provide RPRH Counseling and FP Services

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to Consultation room
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.2: Conduct medical consultation; refer if complicated

steps.client_step: 3. Back to Counseling Room
steps.agency_action: 4. Schedule follow-up and explain doctor's orders

external_services.who_may_avail: Nearest kin of the deceased person

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Medical Abstract (if died at home after confinement) or Filled-up Death Certificate signed by attending physician

steps.client_step: 1. Fill out Information Sheet at CHO transaction window
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.4: Receive sheet, interview client, process certificate/payment slip, and sign certificate

steps.client_step: 2. Pay fee at the City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Present receipt to claim certificate
steps.agency_action: 3. Release signed Death Certificate and advise on Civil Registrar registration

external_services.service_name: Request for Medical Certificate for Employment

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: CSC Form 211 – Medical Certificate for Employment (1 original copy)
Chest X-ray result (not more than 6 months old)
Blood test, Urinalysis, Drug test, and Neuro-psychiatric exam results
Other requirements stated in the CIVIL SERVICE CHECKLIST (if government application)

steps.client_step: 1. Approach the CHO through the transaction window and state the request
steps.agency_action: 1. Acknowledges the client, assesses the request, and gives the payment slip

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the medical fee at City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Present the official receipt to CHO to claim the medical certificate
steps.agency_action: 3-4: Process the request and issue the requested medical certificate
steps.person_responsible: City Health Officer, Medical Officer on duty, Midwife II

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Marriage claim slip (1 original copy)

steps.client_step: 1. Download Viber, search 09069079874, and send application number and release date
steps.agency_action: 1. Send PMC videos and activities to the couples via Viber

steps.client_step: 2. Send the answered activities to the Lipa City Health Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Check and evaluate the answers of the couples

steps.client_step: 3. Receive the date of the actual seminar
steps.agency_action: 3. Schedule the date of seminar for the couples

steps.client_step: 4. Attend the seminar and fill up information forms
steps.agency_action: 4-5: Conduct PMC seminar and record attendee information

steps.client_step: 5. Claim the PMC certificates
steps.agency_action: 6. Release the PMC Certificates and refer the couples to the DSWD
